div.p: sizeof(Value) = 64 Bytes Matches standard x86-64 Cache Line boundary.

text.tspan: # The local derivative is 1.0, so upstream
# The local derivative is 1.0, so upstream

div.p: Because the gradient distributor ($+$) propagates signals with a multiplier of 1.0, it is the fundamental building block for ResNets. It prevents signal decay across deep layers.
Local Gradients: $\frac{\partial c}{\partial a} = 1.0$ $\frac{\partial c}{\partial b} = 1.0$
Chain Rule Application: $\frac{\partial L}{\partial a} = \frac{\partial L}{\partial c} \cdot 1.0$ $\frac{\partial L}{\partial b} = \frac{\partial L}{\partial c} \cdot 1.0$
